name: VideoVault Premiere Extension
releaseNotes:
- Cut a patch release for the Premiere extension to clean up version presentation and packaged metadata.
- Kept the current background telemetry and panel-closed capture path intact.
- Focused this release on low-risk polish so desktop-driven installs stay consistent.
- Bumped the extension bundle version to `1.4.1`.
- Updated the visible panel version flow so the UI can reflect the manifest-backed extension version.
- Kept the standard Windows zip and macOS pkg outputs expected by the desktop updater.
- Added the `1.4.1` release note file as the source of truth for this extension release.
- The extension release workflows continue to use this markdown file for both the GitHub Release body and updater-facing release notes.
- This note was refreshed to trigger a fresh release commit without changing the shipped version.
